title: BonqDAO - REKT
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation followed by flash loan and liquidation on Polygon-based lending and stablecoin protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls submitValue() on TellorFlex contract followed by a flash loan in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK SUBMITVALUE -> FLASHLOAN in single tx
summary: BonqDAO was hacked through oracle manipulation where the attacker manipulated the price feed to allow a flash loan and subsequent liquidation, resulting in a loss of $120M. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting a submitValue() call followed by a flash loan in the same transaction.
